title: The Crew Leaves Zou
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the crew leaves zou within the Leaving Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: Out- skirts of the Guardians Residential District

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Heee-y!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aaaaaagggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggggg

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Peko- Manushi's House was destroyed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You okay?! answer me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There is no need to fret.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: " A turtle?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sheesh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A man can't even get any alone time around here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gaoh*!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're actually a turtle- mamushi?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: sigh. We're getting further and further away from my actual name by the day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Gaoh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I ate the Kame-Kame no mi! My shell is as imperable as a diamond!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Chopper said he'll be taking responsibility for your care!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I see!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No type of reaction to the diamond comment? I see. GAOH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahh, I truly am grateful for the treatment. You all just keep saving my hide!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Right. We needs' get going! Off to big mom's!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wait a minute! You madman! I'm still barely clinging onto life here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What in blazes?! I can't believe this guy! Worst Savior ever!

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: Guardians residential district

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Master!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: pedro.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Sanji is a Savior of this country, and yet he was kidnapped from within its borders!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Though I understand the need for a small team, save pekoms,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There isn't a single milk in the rescue party!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I do not believe this is honorable in the least.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You tellin' me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You wanna go too?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Quit trying to get the jump on us, Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: The duty of accompanying the Sanji Rescue Party! We of Inuarashi's three musketeers shall see to it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Know your place, Sicilian! A boisterous fool like you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is the last person that should go on a covert mission like this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Who are you calling boisterous, you spotted bastard!

summary: The Crew Leaves Zou: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
